title: PMW Plus+
description: PMW Plus — Extreme Weather & Immersion Modpack
body:
# PMW Plus — Extreme Weather & Immersion Modpack

**PMW Plus** is a Minecraft modpack focused on extreme weather, natural disasters, and deep environmental immersion.
The modpack is built around **ProtoManly’s Weather** and enhanced with **PMW Extra**, along with carefully selected mods that expand storms, tornadoes, seasons, wind behavior, sound physics, and visual atmosphere.

## Features

Advanced dynamic weather system powered by ProtoManly’s Weather

PMW Extra with extended storm and weather mechanics

Tornadoes, strong winds, debris, and environmental destruction

Seasonal changes affecting the world and environment

Realistic wind behavior and wind measurement systems

Immersive sound physics with echo and distance-based audio

Enhanced particles, shaders, and visual effects

Improved world generation and biome variety

Performance optimizations for smooth gameplay

### Experience

Weather in PMW Plus is more than visual effects.
Storms feel dangerous, wind interacts with the environment, and seasons change how the world looks and behaves, creating an immersive and atmospheric survival experience.

##  Required Resource Pack (preset):

**Download using this preset:**
https://vanillatweaks.net/share#AI7Uqp

**Этот пакет ресурсов ОБЕЗАТЕЛЕН хоть он и добавляет немного но значительно улучшает игру (вы наверно даже не заметите разницу но всё равно скачайте XD)**

### Shaders & Resource Packs

PMW Plus supports any shader pack compatible with modern Minecraft versions.
However, for the best visual quality and atmospheric experience, **[Photon Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)** is highly recommended, as it works especially well with dynamic weather, storms, clouds, and lighting effects.

To achieve the intended look and full immersion, enabling the included resource packs is strongly recommended. They enhance visual details, environment effects, and overall atmosphere of the modpack.

Shaders and resource packs are optional but greatly improve the experience and visual impact of the weather system.

## Links

**[ProtoManly’s Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather)**
